title: scyphostelma harlingii
intro: Scyphostelma harlingii, also known as Harling's Scyphostelma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can be beneficial in treating various infections. The health benefits of Scyphostelma harlingii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it a promising natural remedy for skin conditions and injuries. In terms of herbal preparations, Scyphostelma harlingii can be used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
